case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. MIDNIGHT ROAD CARRIERS LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 585 (D) AND ASSIGNMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100224124) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 100199958) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100220485) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. SERVED OCT-19-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MIDNIGHT ROAD CARRIERS LLC AKA MIDNIGHT ROAD CARRIERS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIDNIGHT ROAD CARRIERS LLC AKA MIDNIGHT ROAD CARRIERS $11,261.21 PRINCIPAL, $1,450.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,830.50 INTEREST, $790.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,332.70, SEE SCANNED DOC
